d: Soren selects a tile and rushes there to swing his weapon, dealing [[250%]]<ATK> damage to adjacent enemies and knocking them back [[1]] tile. If the targets collide with allies, enemies, terrain, or battlefield borders along their path, they take [[400%]]<ATK> damage and are stunned for [[2.5]]s. This skill prioritizes targeting the tile that will cause the most enemies to collide when cast automatically.
Soren deals [[400%]]<ATK> damage and stuns another enemy for [[2.5]]s if the target knocked back by this skill collides with them.
Increases the collision damage to [[410%]]<ATK>.
Increases the collision damage to [[420%]]<ATK>.
Increases the collision damage to [[430%]]<ATK>.

Soren swings his weapon to deal [[180%]]<ATK> damage to an enemy in melee range, knocking them back [[1]] tile. If the target collides with allies, enemies, terrain, or battlefield borders along their path, they take [[250%]]<ATK> damage and are stunned for [[1.5]]s. Soren repositions himself to ensure maximum collisions between targets when casting this skill.
Increases base damage to [[210%]]<ATK>.
Increases the collision damage to [[270%]]<ATK>.
Extends the stun duration upon collision to [[2]]s.
Soren reduces the damage taken from a single attack that exceeds [[10%]] of his max HP by [[70%]], resetting the cooldown of Repel Sweep. This effect can be triggered once every [[7]]s.
Increases the DMG Reduction ratio to [[80%]].
Increases the DMG Reduction ratio to [[90%]].
Reduces the skill cooldown to [[6]]s.
Increases Haste by [[12]] during battle.
Increases Haste by [[16]] during battle.
Increases Haste by [[20]] during battle.
Soren gains [[60]] Haste and recovers [[4%]] of max HP and [[40]] Energy per second for [[12]]s when his HP ratio is below [[60%]]. This effect can only be triggered once per battle.
Soren removes all active control effects when this skill is triggered. It can be triggered repeatedly in a single battle, with a cooldown of [[25]]s.
Increases the bonus Haste to [[80]] while this skill is active.
Increases the HP recovery to [[5%]] of the max HP per second while this skill is active.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, gains [[15]] Penetration and [[15]] Haste for [[5]]s when a battle starts and when [[assisting or defeating]] an enemy.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 14 Crit Resist, 8 Haste, 8 Ranged DEF.

d: After Deflecting Swing is triggered, the next Repel Sweep knocks enemies back [[2]] tiles and deals bonus damage equal to [[50%]] of the damage blocked.

If an enemy hit by Whirlwind Swing or Repel Sweep collides with any unit, terrain, or battlefield boundaries while being knocked back, restores [[80]] Energy to Soren. This also grants Soren a shield equal to [[100%]]<ATK> for the rest of the battle and refreshes the cooldown of Deflecting Swing. This effect can be triggered once per skill cast.
